---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for FlightLog
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What problem would this solve?**

A clear description of the problem or use case. ("I'm always frustrated when...")

**What would you like to happen?**

A clear description of the feature or change you're proposing.

**Have you checked the roadmap?**

FlightLog's [`docs/ROADMAP.md`](../../docs/ROADMAP.md) lists planned stages and a set of deliberate non-negotiables (local-first, no ads/tracking, free to run, no server dependency for core features). If your idea conflicts with one of those, it helps to say so up front — it doesn't mean it's off the table, but it may need a design discussion rather than a straightforward PR.

**Alternatives considered**

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've thought about.

**Additional context**

Mockups, links, or examples from other apps, if helpful.
